title: Prioritize first-user acquisition and proof of demand.
action: Invite 3 target users to upload real situations and record outcomes.
expected_outcome: At least one external user completes the CYVX loop.

title: Prioritize a public runtime users can access.
action: Deploy the public demo and add the link to README.
expected_outcome: A public URL is usable by someone outside the local machine.

title: Prioritize reducing first-minute confusion.
action: Compress onboarding into one question, one analysis, one top mission.
expected_outcome: A new user understands the value in under 60 seconds.

title: Prioritize expected-vs-actual outcome proof.
action: Record expected result, actual result, score, and lesson for each mission.
expected_outcome: Every mission has a measurable outcome record.

title: Prioritize the highest-leverage skill gap.
source_reality: Need learning and career modes later
action: Create one focused learning quest with practice and feedback.

title: Prioritize approval gates before automation.
action: Require explicit approval before destructive or external actions.
expected_outcome: No unsafe automation executes without approval.
